archimate:DataObject.name: Solution Specification
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: Solution Specification ABB is a Data Object that refers to detailed description of the requirements and functionality of a proposed solution to a specific problem or challenge
Source: ISA2-EIF
Source reference: https://ec.europa.eu/isa2/eif_en/
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/SolutionSpecificationDataObject
eira:ID: ABB486
ABB name: eira:SolutionSpecificationDataObject

properties.value: Solution Specification ABB is a Data Object that sets normative statement describing a SBB or describing how to implement a SBB
